name: Seadramon

signature_move.name: Ice Arrow
signature_move.description: Breathesabsolute zeroair out of its mouth, instantly freezing water and firing it at the opponent.

description: An Aquatic Digimon that has a long, serpentine body. Using its long body, it wreathes itself around approaching enemies and constricts them until they are suffocated. It did not have any intelligence to begin with, and it swims around the Net Ocean , wherever its instincts take it. Its Special Move is breathing absolute zero air out of its mouth, instantly freezing water and firing it at the opponent ( Ice Arrow ).
